data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific entry triggers: booking completed, no-show, membership expiring, and form submitted. While there is evidence of a booking being completed, there is no evidence provided for the other triggers such as no-show, membership expiring, or form submission. This indicates a gap in the coverage of the requirement as not all entry triggers have been validated.
evidencePointers: No evidence for no-show, membership expiring, or form submitted.
gaps: No evidence of no-show trigger validation.
No evidence of membership expiring trigger validation.
No evidence of form submitted trigger validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
